/usr/bin/c++  -std=gnu++11 -g CMakeFiles/toronto_ad.dir/toronto_ad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toronto_ad.dir/statekey.cpp.o CMakeFiles/toronto_ad.dir/transfer.cpp.o -o toronto_ad  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cyclone_cplusapi/lib:/opt/cyclone/lib /opt/cyclone_cplusapi/lib/libddscxx.so.0.11.0 /opt/cyclone/lib/libddsc.so.0.11.0
